title: Decode Meshtastic Position packets into local-client location provider
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.4 identified MESHTASTIC_PORTNUM_POSITION_APP as the compatibility app path for injected locations, but the Meshtastic adapter currently treats Position packets as unsupported. What needs to be done: add a decoded Position packet kind and adapter operation, parse position payload metadata, map it to local-client location semantics through the app-interface/HAL bridge or directly to lichen_hal_location_sample, and add native_sim/qemu adapter/gateway tests proving Position packets update lichen_hal_location_time_snapshot_get().
